rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks with valid syntax using assume/guarantee/eq/const/assign statements inside annex agree {** ... **} blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
generic_rules: Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when they reference visible features or constants
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for expressing relationships between assumptions and guarantees
Ensure all identifiers in generated AGREE clauses are visible in the current component scope
Move implementation-specific assignments to component implementation annexes, not type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Equations and constants should be declared with explicit types: eq name : type = expression;
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens (ms/us/Hz/Bytes) as AGREE variables
Do not generate clauses that reference unresolved identifiers or ports not visible in current scope
